comparison.title: Still Writing Reviews the Hard Way?
comparison.traditional_step1_desc: Repeatedly search databases, trying keywords again and again
comparison.traditional_step2_desc: Screen and download papers one by one, manually format citations

process.title: How It Works
process.subtitle: Complete a professional literature review in three steps
process.step1_desc: Enter your research topic - it can be a brief description or detailed research direction requirements.
process.step2_desc: AI automatically searches literature, analyzes and filters, organizes structure, and writes the review - fully automated.
process.step3_desc: Preview review content online, export to Word documents, ready for academic writing.
